RULING: PETITION OF MARY GILLUM TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF JULIUS GILLUM BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION
Hearing held, argued and Court GRANTED the Petition of Mary Gillum to Perpetuate Testimony of Julius Gillum by Videotaped Deposition. The Court did not consider the opposition filed by Deutz Corporation but was allowed to make oral argument. Counsel to meet and confer on date and time of deposition. Prevailing party to submit order for Court Signature and must include language from Defendant Kion North America, date and time of deposition, and that defendant Deutz Corporation's oppostion was not considered due to untimely filing. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
